name: Underline Focus
description: Smooth expanding precision anchor line accent
css: .uf-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .uf { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #2d3748; color: #f5f5f5; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .uf::placeholder { color: #4a5568; } .uf-wrap::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #6366f1; transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .uf:focus + .uf-wrap::after, .uf-wrap:focus-within::after { width: 100%; }

name: Outline Glow
description: Soft crisp volumetric border glow layout
css: .in-outline { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #3f3f46; border-radius: 8px; color: #f5f5f5; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .in-outline::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-outline:hover { border-color: #52525b; } .in-outline:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15); outline: none; }

name: Soft Filled
description: Muted background with tactical elevation transition
css: .in-filled { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #18181b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s; } .in-filled::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-filled:hover { background: #202024; border-color: #3f3f46; } .in-filled:focus { background: #09090b; border-color: #a855f7; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.15); }

name: Pill Input
description: Fully rounded core capsule with micro depth shadow
css: .in-pill { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 24px; background: #111; border: 1px solid #222; border-radius: 999px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.25s; } .in-pill::placeholder { color: #444; } .in-pill:hover { border-color: #333; } .in-pill:focus { background: #161616; border-color: #06b6d4; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.15); }

name: Bottom Glow
description: Vibrant custom neon underline drop glow projection
css: .in-bglow { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 0; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #27272a; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.25s; } .in-bglow::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-bglow:focus { border-bottom-color: #06b6d4; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px -4px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35); outline: none; }

name: Floating Label
description: Interactive layout label scales upward fluidly
css: .fl-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .fl { width: 100%; padding: 14px 0; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #27272a; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.25s; } .fl:focus { border-bottom-color: #6366f1; } .fl + label { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 14px; color: #52525b; font-size: 15px; pointer-events: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .fl:focus + label, .fl:not(:placeholder-shown) + label { transform: translateY(-24px) scale(0.8); transform-origin: top left; color: #6366f1; font-weight: 600; }

name: Neon Cyber
description: High voltage technical layout with intense grid bleed
css: .in-neon { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #000; border: 2px solid #f43f5e; color: #f43f5e; font-family: monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .in-neon::placeholder { color: rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.4); } .in-neon:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.5), inset 0 0 6px rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.3); outline: none; }

name: Neumorphic Inset
description: Tactile micro-bevel architectural inset panel
css: .in-soft { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 18px; background: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 14px; border: none; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 15px; box-shadow: inset 5px 5px 10px #bebebe, inset -5px -5px 10px #ffffff; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .in-soft::placeholder { color: #8e8e8e; } .in-soft:focus { box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 5px #bebebe, inset -2px -2px 5px #ffffff; outline: none; background: #e3e3e3; }

name: Vector Left Slot
description: Integrated crisp vector geometry utility track
css: .il-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 18px; background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 10px; transition: all 0.2s; } .il-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1); } .il-wrap:focus-within svg { stroke: #3b82f6; } .il { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .il::placeholder { color: #52525b; }

name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted crystalline layer boundary framing
css: .in-glass { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 10px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.25s; } .in-glass::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); } .in-glass:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); } .in-glass:focus { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); }

name: Minimal Line
description: Ultra clean typographic core structure boundary
css: .in-min { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 12px 0; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #3f3f46; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .in-min::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-min:focus { border-bottom-color: #ffffff; outline: none; }

name: Retro 3D Box
description: Brutalist block edge outline with drop displacement
css: .in-retro { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff; border: 2.5px solid #000; color: #000; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px #000; transition: all 0.15s; } .in-retro::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .in-retro:focus { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #000; outline: none; }

name: Counter Track
description: Dynamic dynamic text counter embedded metadata line
html: 0/20
css: .ib-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .ib-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 60px 14px 16px; background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s; } .ib-input::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .ib-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; outline: none; } .ib-counter { position: absolute; right: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #52525b; font-family: monospace; pointer-events: none; }

name: Center Slide Line
description: Bi-directional scaling structural focal line design
css: .sb-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .sb-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 0; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #27272a; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .sb-input::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .sb-line { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #ec4899; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .sb-input:focus ~ .sb-line { width: 100%; left: 0; }

name: Gradient Border
description: Multi-colored ambient mask responsive frame rail
css: .gb-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5px; background: #27272a; transition: background 0.3s; } .gb-wrap:focus-within { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f43f5e, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4); } .gb-input { width: 100%; padding: 13px 16px; background: #09090b; border: none; border-radius: 7px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; }

name: Mono High Contrast
description: Crisp block framing layout for stark minimal layouts
css: .in-mono { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: 2px solid #27272a; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; font-family: monospace; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.15s; } .in-mono::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-mono:focus { border-color: #ffffff; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; outline: none; }

name: Dynamic Box Float
description: Fully encased border frame with label intersection grid
css: .mat-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .mat-input { width: 100%; padding: 16px; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #3f3f46; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .mat-input:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; } .mat-label { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: #020202; padding: 0 6px; color: #a1a1aa; font-size: 15px; pointer-events: none; transition: transform 0.2s, top 0.2s, font-size 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .mat-input:focus + .mat-label, .mat-input:not(:placeholder-shown) + .mat-label { top: 0; transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.85); color: #3b82f6; font-weight: 600; }

name: Prepend Unit Label
description: Fixed protocol namespace accent block entry track
css: .in-tag-wrap { display: flex; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; background: #09090b; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .in-tag-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #10b981; } .in-tag-lbl { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #18181b; padding: 0 14px; border-right: 1px solid #27272a; color: #71717a; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; user-select: none; } .in-tag-field { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 14px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .in-tag-field::placeholder { color: #444; }

name: OS Matte Overlay
description: Soft light luxury micro canvas depth design
css: .in-mac { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 6px; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05); transition: background 0.15s; } .in-mac::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .in-mac:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: #3b82f6; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.3); outline: none; }

name: Dashed Boundary
description: Clean dashed utility style frame structure focus line
css: .in-dashed { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: 2px dashed #3f3f46; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .in-dashed::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-dashed:focus { border-color: #f59e0b; border-style: solid; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.1); outline: none; }

name: Dual Tone Split
description: Dynamic contrasting split tone background focus flip
css: .in-split { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #111; border: 1px solid #222; border-left: 4px solid #6b7280; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s; } .in-split::placeholder { color: #444; } .in-split:focus { background: #1a1a1a; border-color: #3b82f6; border-left-color: #3b82f6; outline: none; }

name: Validation Secure
description: Color-coded micro positive check accent boundary
css: .isc-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .isc-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 44px 14px 16px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.03); border: 1.5px solid #10b981; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.05); } .isc-wrap svg { position: absolute; right: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }

name: Validation Alert
description: Attention vector perimeter flash error design
css: .ier-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .ier-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 44px 14px 16px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.03); border: 1.5px solid #ef4444; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.05); } .ier-wrap svg { position: absolute; right: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }

name: Vector Right Slot
description: Trailing metadata indicator block action frame
css: .ir-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 18px; background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 10px; transition: all 0.2s; } .ir-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #f59e0b; } .ir-wrap:focus-within svg { stroke: #f59e0b; } .ir-field { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .ir-field::placeholder { color: #52525b; }

name: Thick Rim Framework
description: Heavy geometric outline perimeter mapping shift
css: .in-thick { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #111; border: 2px solid #27272a; border-radius: 6px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.15s ease-out; } .in-thick::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-thick:focus { border-color: #fff; border-width: 3px; padding: 13px 15px; outline: none; }

name: Bracket Tech
description: Corner bounding line brackets that cinch tight on focus
css: .ic-bracket-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 2px; } .ic-bracket-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #27272a; color: #fff; font-family: monospace; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ic-bracket-wrap .corner-tl, .ic-bracket-wrap .corner-br { position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; border: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.3s ease; pointer-events: none; } .ic-bracket-wrap .corner-tl { top: 0; left: 0; border-top-color: #3b82f6; border-left-color: #3b82f6; } .ic-bracket-wrap .corner-br { bottom: 0; right: 0; border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; border-right-color: #3b82f6; } .ic-bracket-input:focus { border-color: transparent; } .ic-bracket-input:focus ~ .corner-tl { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .ic-bracket-input:focus ~ .corner-br { width: 100%; height: 100%; }

name: Luminous Chamber
description: Internal luminous background fade activation track
css: .in-fadeff { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .in-fadeff::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-fadeff:focus { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.05); border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 10px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); outline: none; }

name: Raw Industrial
description: Flat high visibility architectural canvas border block
css: .in-sharpb { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #000; border: 2px solid #3f3f46; color: #fff; font-family: monospace; font-size: 15px; text-transform: uppercase; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .in-sharpb::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .in-sharpb:focus { border-color: #eab308; background: #111; }

name: Inset Gradient Ridge
description: Premium internal ambient gradient depth mapping layout
css: .in-srim { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); outline: none; transition: all 0.2s; } .in-srim::placeholder { color: #3f3f46; } .in-srim:focus { border-color: #4b5563; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 0 12px rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }

name: Framed Rail Tracker
description: Double tracking line boundaries with clean transition
css: .dl-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a; padding-bottom: 2px; } .dl-wrap::before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #27272a; } .dl-field { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; padding: 10px 0; outline: none; } .dl-field::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .dl-wrap::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #f43f5e; transition: width 0.3s ease; } .dl-field:focus + .dl-wrap::after, .dl-wrap:focus-within::after { width: 100%; }

name: Luminous Trace
description: Dynamic structural track line expansion focus filter
css: .rg-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; background: #09090b; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #27272a; overflow: hidden; } .rg-field { width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; outline: none; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .rg-field::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .rg-wrap::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08)); z-index: 1; transition: height 0.25s ease; } .rg-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #3b82f6; } .rg-wrap:focus-within::after { height: 100%; }

name: Inverted Shift Box
description: Background color block swap on dynamic interaction
css: .in-fslide { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: 2px solid #fff; border-radius: 0; color: #fff; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .in-fslide::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; } .in-fslide:focus { background: #ffffff; color: #000000; outline: none; }
